title: ilex arisanensis
intro: Ilex arisanensis, also known as Taiwanese holly or Arisan holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex arisanensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Ilex arisanensis may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
